generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security and stability, I want to share an important perspective from retired General James Whitmore. He served 30 years in NATO command roles and emphasizes that our alliances are only as strong as our commitment. 'Cutting defense budgets while global threats evolve is like tightening your seatbelt during a crash,' he warns. The general points out that our partners are watching our domestic debates closely - consistent, visible commitment is what actually deters aggression. For our safety, we need steady investment in these alliances. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrength
